opinion.h: Vivian Wycliffe BUIE, petitioner, v. The UNITED STATES of America.* No. 118.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. William R. Watkins, of Ft. Worth, Tex., for petitioner.
Mr. Homer S. Cummings, Atty. Gen., for the United States.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 166.[ Buie v. U S 296 U.S. 585 (1935) ]
